summary: Changed all renderer.setSize() calls to pass updateStyle=false as third argument in scene.ts, resize.ts, and main.ts. Removed all manual renderer.domElement.style.width/height='100%' assignments — CSS stylesheet rule (canvas { width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important }) now exclusively owns canvas layout. Updated mock WebGLRenderer.setSize signatures across all test files to accept the optional third parameter. Updated existing test assertions that expected inline style '100%' to expect '' (empty). Created 4 new test files with 19 tests covering all acceptance criteria: updateStyle=false enforcement, pixel-ratio-only scaling, no-black-bars simulations (iPhone SE, iPad Pro), orientation change handling, visualViewport support, cleanup, and context restore.
